Name: APlayerStart
Description: This class indicates a location where a player can spawn when the game begins

Variables.Name: PlayerStartTag
Variables.Description:
~ To take more control over PlayerStart selection, you can override the virtual AGameModeBase::FindPlayerStart and AGameModeBase::ChoosePlayerStart functions. 
	 Used when searching for which playerstart to use.

Variables.Name: ArrowComponent
Variables.Description: Arrow component to indicate forward direction of start
